syllogism_text: It is the case that some clouds are white. There are some sheep that are also white. This implies that all sheep are clouds.

attempts.code:
% Facts for the premises
cloud(whitestorm).
sheep(lamb1).

% Facts for the common attribute (white)
white(whitestorm).
white(lamb1).

% Validity check: All sheep are clouds → For all sheep, they must also be clouds
valid_syllogism :- \+ (sheep(X), \+ cloud(X)).
